name: WILLIS LEASE FINANCE CORP
business: Willis Lease Finance Corp acquires and leases commercial aircraft engines and aircraft, and sells aircraft engine parts and materials, to commercial aircraft operators and maintenance, repair, and overhaul organizations.

exposures.sentence: We operate as a supplier of engines, aircraft and related parts ( aviation equipment ) to commercial aircraft operators and MROs.
Cyberattacks or other information security breaches could adversely affect our business, operating results and financial condition.
technological developments, including the increasing use of Artificial Intelligence

catalysts.event: Commitment to purchase 18 LEAP-1B engines and 28 LEAP-1A engines by 2030
catalysts.sentence: We are currently committed to purchasing 18 additional new LEAP-1B engines and 28 additional new LEAP-1A engines for an aggregate total of $857.4 million by 2030.

catalysts.event: Commitment to purchase six PW1133 engines in 2026
catalysts.sentence: we are currently committed to purchasing six PW1133 engines for approximately $104.0 million in 2026.

catalysts.event: Commitment to future overhaul and maintenance services by 2030
catalysts.sentence: We have committed to certain future overhaul and maintenance services which are anticipated to range between $106.6 million and $131.9 million by 2030.
